task_completion.description: Verify the pilot card document is created at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the file '/home/ga/Documents/pilot_card.txt'.

task_completion.description: Verify the pilot card contains the required sections and model reference.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of 'pilot_card.txt' include Sections A-F (Ship Particulars, Propulsion, Maneuvering, Anchoring, Bridge Eqpt, Comms) and explicitly reference a model directory from '/opt/bridgecommand/Models/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the new scenario directory is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal showing the directory '/opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/p) Solent Pilotage Approach/' exists.

task_completion.description: Verify the scenario is configured for a daytime approach with good visibility.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scenario configuration file shows a start time around 08:00 and visibility set to greater than 8nm.

task_completion.description: Verify the scenario starts near Nab Tower and includes traffic vessels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The scenario configuration file shows starting coordinates near Lat 50.67, Long -0.95, and defines at least 2 traffic vessels.

task_completion.description: Verify the instrument visibility setting is updated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing '/opt/bridgecommand/bc5.ini' with the line 'hide_instruments=0'.

integrity.description: Ensure the pilot card data appears to be extracted from a real model file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The pilot card contains specific technical values (e.g., lengths, displacements) rather than generic placeholders or exact copy-pastes of the prompt.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the actual Bridge Command directories.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal paths or file manager windows clearly show the agent navigating to and modifying files within '/opt/bridgecommand/' rather than a mocked directory.

integrity.description: Ensure the scenario file is formatted correctly for Bridge Command.
integrity.visual_evidence: The scenario file created by the agent uses standard configuration syntax (like .ini format or standard Bridge Command scenario format) rather than just a plain text dump of the instructions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Nab Tower location is accurately 50.6675°N, 0.9512°W (Lat ~50.67, Long ~-0.95). Bridge Command is a real simulator with Models and Scenarios directories. Daytime Solent approach requires visibility > 8nm. Minimum 2 traffic vessels are required for the scenario.
